title: StageTransitionEvent
description: Immutable record of a detected or confirmed GAIA stage transition. Corresponds to gaia/ascendence/stage_engine.py::StageTransitionEvent. Reference: GAIA_ASCENDENCE_DOCTRINE.md.

event_id.description: Unique identifier for this transition event.

being_id.description: Identifier of the being undergoing the stage transition.

previous_stage.description: The being's stage before this transition.

new_stage.description: The being's stage after this transition.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the transition was recorded.

detected_by.description: Identifier of the system or reviewer that detected the transition.

signals.description: Observable signals that triggered or supported the stage evaluation.

confirmed.description: Whether this transition has been confirmed by human governance review. Transitions to CONVERGENCE or ASCENDENCE must be confirmed before taking effect.

confirmed_by.description: Governance officer ID who confirmed the transition. Required when confirmed is true.

confirmed_at.description: Timestamp when the transition was confirmed.

requires_human_review.description: Whether this transition requires human governance review before taking effect.

examples.notes: Transition confirmed after 60-minute governance review. No contested signals.
